positive: A visually symmetrical, highly detailed graphic print featuring celestial bodies, stylized lunar phases, and fantastical, bioluminescent floral elements. The composition must maintain a central, balanced focus, suitable for seamless repeat pattern on apparel. Style: Inspired by Art Nouveau engravings and modern minimalist silhouette design. Color Palette: Deep indigo, cosmic sapphire, gold foil accents, and soft, glowing teal. Lighting: Dramatic, high contrast backlighting creating crisp, clean edges and strong silhouettes. Composition: Perfect flat graphic art, intricate linework, no gradient shading, highly vector-like illustration.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, amateur drawing, text, watermark, signature, messy, cluttered, bad composition, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photographic, photorealism
